title: Policy Manifest Schema
description: Schema for validating SPARXSTAR policy manifest entries.

policyName.description: Full name of the policy document.

policyType.description: Classifies the document as the umbrella master terms or a subsidiary module.

purpose.description: Brief description of what this policy governs.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the policy.

jurisdictionScope.description: Named jurisdictions this policy applies to.

dependsOnMasterTerms.description: Whether this policy is incorporated by reference into the Master Terms of Service. Must be false for policyType 'master'.

draftingPriority.description: Relative drafting priority. Lower numbers drafted first.

filePath.description: Relative path to the policy document file.

version.description: Current version of the policy document (semver).

date.description: Date this manifest entry was last updated (ISO 8601).

sourceModels.description: List of structural source models referenced during drafting.

culturalOverlay.description: Whether this policy has a cultural protocol overlay.

jurisdictionOverlays.description: Named jurisdiction overlays that modify this policy.
